name: Crockpot Beef and Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or crock-pot with browning unit, brown the beef; break up any large chunks with a fork.
2. Pour off excess fat.
3. In a small bowl, mix together salt, pepper, onion, and undiluted soup.
4. Peel and slice the potatoes.
5. In the crock pot, arrange alternating layers of potatoes and meat, starting with potatoes at the bottom.
6. Pour the soup mixture over everything.
7. Cover and cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.
8. Turn the control to high.
9. Pour cream over all; cover and cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes.
Makes 6 servings.
